summary: Complete testing of role selector in welcome popup and Karaoke/DJ button distinction. Backend: 13/13 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Welcome popup with 5 role options working, DJ role redirects to /dj, Homepage Karaoke Sign Up and Request a Song buttons working correctly based on karaoke/DJ status. All requested features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: WelcomePopup component correctly implements role selector with 5 roles: Customer, Server, Bartender, Manager, DJ
POST /api/user/register correctly saves name, phone, email, role to user_profiles collection
Invalid roles default to 'customer' - good defensive coding
DJ role selection correctly redirects to /dj page after form submission
LinkTreeHomePage correctly iterates through locations to find active karaoke or DJ presence
Homepage shows 'Karaoke Sign Up - Live at {location}!' button when karaoke is active with data-testid='karaoke-live-btn'
Homepage shows 'Request a Song at {location}' button when DJ present but karaoke off with data-testid='request-song-btn'
CheckInPage shows 'Karaoke Sign Up' button (data-testid='karaoke-request-btn') when karaokeActive is true
CheckInPage shows 'Request a Song' button (data-testid='request-song-btn') when djPresent is true but karaokeActive is false

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All role selector, DJ redirect, and karaoke/request song buttons working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed user profiles and DJ profiles for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role selector feature fully tested. Welcome popup shows 5 roles (Customer, Server, Bartender, Manager, DJ). Customer is default. DJ role redirects to /dj after signup. Homepage checks all locations for karaoke/DJ status to show appropriate button. Check-in page requires geolocation (can't be fully tested in headless browser) but code logic verified correct.

Welcome Popup Role Selector.details: 5 role buttons present: Customer, Server, Bartender, Manager, DJ. Customer selected by default. Clicking role changes selection.

POST /api/user/register with role.details: All 5 roles tested: customer, server, bartender, manager, dj. Invalid/missing role defaults to customer.

DJ Role Redirects to /dj.details: Selecting DJ role and submitting welcome popup navigates to /dj page

Homepage Karaoke Sign Up Button.details: Button appears with data-testid='karaoke-live-btn' when karaoke is active at any location. Shows location name.

Homepage Request a Song Button.details: Button appears with data-testid='request-song-btn' when DJ present but karaoke OFF. Shows location name.

Check-In Page Karaoke/Request Buttons.details: Code correctly shows 'Karaoke Sign Up' when karaokeActive, 'Request a Song' when djPresent && !karaokeActive

GET /api/dj/at-location/{slug}.details: Returns checked_in, dj_id, dj_name when DJ present

GET /api/karaoke/status/{slug}.details: Returns active status and dj_id when karaoke is on

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features working as expected
